title: AMA: Associative Motor Architecture
abstract: We present the Associative Motor Architecture (AMA), a conceptual framework for artificial intelligence that rejects monolithic function approximation in favor of six-layer neural federalism. Drawing from vertebrate neurobiology, AMA distributes cognitive sovereignty across distinct temporal scales: from millisecond-scale spinal reflexes (L0) capable of vetoing higher layers, to second-scale narrative consciousness (L5) operating via single-stream broadcasting.

title: AMA: 联想运动架构
abstract: 本文提出联想运动架构(AMA)，一种拒绝单一整体函数逼近的人工智能概念框架，转而采用六层神经联邦制。AMA借鉴脊椎动物神经生物学，将认知主权分布在不同的时间尺度上：从能够否决更高层级的毫秒级脊髓反射(L0)，到通过单流广播运作的秒级叙事意识(L5)。
